Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: liturgical costume [300210414], ceremonial costume [300210387], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: General term for several types of high headgear signifying rank, including ancient Persian and Asian headgear, the turbanlike official headdresses of ancient Jewish high priests, and the cleft liturgical headdresses worn by Christian bishops and abbots.

Término aplicado a varios tipos de piezas altas de tocas, tales como bandas para la cabeza utilizados por las mujeres de la Antigua Grecia, el tocado oficial en forma de turbante de los antiguso sumo sacerdotes judíos o el tocado litúrgico utilizado por los obispos y abades.

Term die wordt gebruikt voor diverse soorten hoge hoofddeksels zoals de hoofdbanden die door vrouwen in het oude Griekenland werden gedragen, de officiële tulbandachtige hoofdtooien van de oude Joodse hogepriesters of de liturgische hoofddeksels die door bisschoppen en abten worden gedragen.
指數種高頭飾，如古希臘婦女所戴的頭飾帶、古猶太教大祭司所戴的類似頭巾帽的正式頭飾，或主教及大修道院院長的禮拜儀式用頭飾。

Allgemeine Bezeichnung für verschiedene Arten von hohen Kopfbedeckungen, die den Rang anzeigen, einschließlich persischen und asiatischen Kopfschmucks, die turbanähnliche offizielle Kopfbedeckung der alten jüdischen Hohepriester oder die liturgische Kopfbedeckung von christlichen Bischöfen und Äbten.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
